name: agenc-store-templates
description: Deploy-your-own AgenC agent store: config-first Next.js templates + the shared store-core package (PLAN_2 Part C).
comment:overrides: @tetsuo-ai/marketplace-sdk and -react resolve from the npm registry (sdk 0.12.x / react >=0.4.2 <0.5 — see `npm run check:pins`) — never from local tarballs. The other overrides dedupe React types and enforce the patched PostCSS floor across Next templates.
author: Tetsuo AI
